Name: FHeaderRowStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SHeaderRow

Variables.Name: ColumnStyle
Variables.Description: Style of the normal header row columns

Variables.Name: LastColumnStyle
Variables.Description: Style of the last header row column

Variables.Name: ColumnSplitterStyle
Variables.Description: Style of the splitter used between the columns

Variables.Name: BackgroundBrush
Variables.Description: Brush used to draw the header row background

Variables.Name: ForegroundColor
Variables.Description: Color used to draw the header row foreground
